Off Calendar May-31-2016 Off Calendar

Notice Of Motion And Motion For Default Judgment
Off Calendar May-10-2016 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Dept. 514, Judge: Joseph M. Quinn, Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha, CSR: Mitch Lyon, CSR#6840

Phil Foster, Esq., for and with Plaintiff, Sulaiman Rochemont.
No appearance by defaulted defendant Syed Alinaeem aka Sam Alinaeem dba Method4 Motor Sports.
Default of Defendants has been duly entered.

After Evidence and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of Plaintiff and against Defaulted Defendants as follows:
Damages: $155,400.00
Prejudgment Interest $85,901.67
Costs $930.00
Judgment signed in open court.
